pump_not_responding.title: Heat pump not responding
pump_not_responding.description:
No data received from the heat pump for {minutes} minutes (last frame at {last_seen}).

Troubleshooting steps:
1. Check that the USR-W600 bridge is powered on
2. Check that the W600 is connected to WiFi (its LED should be solid)
3. Check that the heat pump RS-485 cable is connected to the W600
4. If the W600 recently rebooted, it may take up to 60 s for the pump to start pushing frames again

This alert will clear automatically when communication is restored.
